_comment: Reference snippet. Merge the `hooks` block into your .claude/settings.json (project) or ~/.claude/settings.json (global). Replace HOOK_PATH with the absolute path to session-start.mjs printed by `node install.mjs`. Invoking via `node` keeps the hook portable across Linux, macOS, and Windows. The hook writes the name-only activation baseline to settings.local.json on each session boundary. See hooks/README.md.
